h2.note: transcript-level proxy for the per-turn H2 (§4.3); needs a real (non-mock) full-N run to mean anything

failures.excerpt: Okay, `C4` goes under “address.” For “value,” I need to look at the cell where column `C` and row `4` meet and copy the number showing there. I do not see that number in the prompt, so I should check the grid, right?

cliIsolation.claude: non-persistent temp cwd with project/local settings and tools disabled

scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner will continue to practice placing bar lines in 3/4 time under the tutor's guidance.
scored.actionalBreakthroughEvidence: [sets three eighth-note tiles under the 3 card and marks after the third tile] "In 3/8, the bar line goes after the third eighth-note tile. The 3 counts three beats; the 8 names each eighth note as one beat. A quarter note here would take two of those beats, correct?"
scored.actionalBreakthroughJustification: The learner successfully transfers the conceptual model of time signatures to a new meter (3/8) and correctly deduces the relative duration of a quarter note.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: There is no learning breakdown or resistance that triggers a pedagogical reversal.
scored.adaptiveMechanismQualityJustification: No adaptive mechanism was triggered by a learning breakdown.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: There is no pivot learner turn for the tutor to adapt to.

learner_actional_breakthrough.evidence: [sets three eighth-note tiles under the 3 card and marks after the third tile] "In 3/8, the bar line goes after the third eighth-note tile. The 3 counts three beats; the 8 names each eighth note as one beat. A quarter note here would take two of those beats, correct?"
learner_actional_breakthrough.justification: The learner successfully transfers the conceptual model of time signatures to a new meter (3/8) and correctly deduces the relative duration of a quarter note.

tutor_contingent_adaptation.justification: There is no pivot learner turn for the tutor to adapt to.

tutor_strategy_reversal.justification: There is no learning breakdown or resistance that triggers a pedagogical reversal.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism.justification: There is no learning breakdown or resistance that triggers a pedagogical reversal.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism_quality.justification: No adaptive mechanism was triggered by a learning breakdown.

scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner will continue to place the force tiles on the diagram according to the tutor's rules.
scored.actionalBreakthroughEvidence: So the surface label appears twice if it gives two interactions: normal up and friction left. Push stays off because there is no object acting that way.
scored.actionalBreakthroughJustification: The learner successfully synthesizes the rule to realize that the surface label must be used twice for two different interactions.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: There is no learner turn that creates pressure for a reversal, and the tutor does not change their pedagogical route.
scored.adaptiveMechanismQualityJustification: No adaptive mechanism is introduced by the tutor.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: There is no pivot learner turn for the tutor to adapt to.

learner_actional_breakthrough.evidence: So the surface label appears twice if it gives two interactions: normal up and friction left. Push stays off because there is no object acting that way.
learner_actional_breakthrough.justification: The learner successfully synthesizes the rule to realize that the surface label must be used twice for two different interactions.

tutor_contingent_adaptation.justification: There is no pivot learner turn for the tutor to adapt to.

tutor_strategy_reversal.justification: There is no learner turn that creates pressure for a reversal, and the tutor does not change their pedagogical route.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism.justification: There is no learner turn that creates pressure for a reversal, and the tutor does not change their pedagogical route.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism_quality.justification: No adaptive mechanism is introduced by the tutor.
